changelog:
* **fix: add cache buster to OTA update checks and filter automated commits from changelogs** (1bc82a9)
  - Add timestamp cache buster and anti-caching HTTP headers to UpdateChecker to defeat raw GitHub CDN caching
  - Reorder OTA manifest update before release tagging in workflow to prevent automated commits from leaking into future changelogs
  - Filter automated OTA and version manifest commits out of changelog generation
